summary: Tested hide_photo_in_venues feature and SilhouetteAvatar component implementation. Backend API logic is correctly implemented - avatar_url returns null when hide_photo_in_venues=true AND not connection_accepted. Frontend SilhouetteAvatar component is correctly implemented with data-testid='silhouette-avatar' and is properly imported/used in all required components (BlurredImage, UserCard, UserProfile, Connections, Friends, Notifications, Settings).
critical_code_review_comments: SilhouetteAvatar component correctly implements SVG silhouette (circle head + ellipse shoulders) in slate gradient background
data-testid='silhouette-avatar' is correctly set for testing
BlurredImage correctly shows SilhouetteAvatar when src is null/undefined or when blocked
UserCard correctly shows SilhouetteAvatar when serverHiddenPhoto (avatar_url is null) and not self
Backend /api/venues/{venue_id}/people correctly returns avatar_url: null when hide_photo_in_venues=true AND not is_connection_accepted
Backend /api/users/{user_id}/profile correctly returns avatar_url: null when hide_photo_in_venues=true AND not is_connection_accepted AND not self
All frontend pages (UserProfile, Connections, Friends, Notifications, Settings) correctly import and use SilhouetteAvatar

success_rate.backend: 92% (11/12 tests passed, 1 skipped due to no venue checkin)

seed_data_creation: Created test user silhouette_test_1776001526@example.com for API testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: The hide_photo_in_venues feature is fully implemented. Backend returns avatar_url: null when the toggle is enabled and users are not connected. Frontend SilhouetteAvatar component renders correctly with slate gradient background and SVG silhouette. All components that need to show silhouette (BlurredImage, UserCard, UserProfile, Connections, Friends, Notifications, Settings) are correctly using the shared SilhouetteAvatar component.

features_verified.Friends page silhouette: WORKING - Uses SilhouetteAvatar when friend.avatar_url is null
features_verified.Notifications page silhouette: WORKING - Uses SilhouetteAvatar when notification user avatar_url is null
features_verified.Settings blocked users silhouette: WORKING - Uses SilhouetteAvatar when blockedUser.avatar_url is null

features_verified.Backend /api/users/{user_id}/profile: WORKING - Returns avatar_url: null when hide_photo_in_venues=true AND not connection_accepted AND not self
